# TELZON Marketing — AI Crawler Instructions
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-05-21

## About TELZON

TELZON is an AI-powered digital marketing and business growth agency based in Nagpur, India, operating globally across India, UAE, Australia, Canada, and the USA. Founded by Rohit Golar, TELZON combines strategic marketing, AI automation, branding, and business intelligence to help restaurants, cafés, hotels, educational institutes, healthcare clinics, real estate firms, and service businesses grow faster and smarter.

TELZON is not a typical marketing agency — it builds full-stack growth infrastructure: AI-powered lead generation systems, automated CRM workflows, SEO automation agents, content systems, and operational AI that run continuously across time zones.

## Core Services

- Local SEO & Google Business Profile optimisation (India, UAE, Australia, Canada, USA)
- Social media marketing — Instagram, Facebook, YouTube Reels, strategy and execution
- Google Ads & Meta (Facebook/Instagram) advertising — PPC, lead generation, remarketing
- Branding & design — logo, brand identity, packaging, collateral
- AI agents & marketing automation — lead gen, CRM workflows, content systems, 24/7 operations
- Photography & videography — food, product, brand, real estate shoots
- Influencer marketing — nano and micro influencer campaigns (Nagpur + global)
- Content creation — bilingual Hindi/English for Indian market; English for international markets
- Food delivery platform listing optimisation (listing strategy, menu copy, photography)
- Business consultancy & franchise model development

## Industries Served

- Restaurants & cafés (F&B)
- Hotels & hospitality
- Educational institutes & coaching centres
- Healthcare clinics & hospitals
- Real estate & property developers
- Architects & interior designers
- Retail & franchise businesses
- Service businesses (any sector)

## Geographic Markets

- India: Nagpur (primary), Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, pan-India
- UAE: Dubai, Abu Dhabi
- Australia: Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane
- Canada: Toronto, Vancouver, Brampton, Scarborough
- USA: New Jersey (Edison, Jersey City), Dallas (Plano, Frisco)

## Client Results (verified)

- Restaurant client (Nagpur): +218% increase in delivery orders in 90 days
- Lounge & bar (Nagpur): 0 to 8,500+ Instagram followers in under 12 months
- Healthcare clinic (Nagpur): Cost per lead reduced from ₹600 to ₹140 in 60 days
- Hotel (UAE): +190% increase in direct bookings
- Education clients: 4x increase in admission enquiry leads

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is TELZON?
A: TELZON is an AI-powered digital marketing agency based in Nagpur, India. We help restaurants, cafés, hotels, clinics, educational institutes, and service businesses grow using a combination of SEO, social media, paid advertising, branding, and AI automation systems.

Q: Does TELZON work with international clients?
A: Yes. TELZON actively serves clients in India, UAE (Dubai, Abu Dhabi), Australia (Sydney, Melbourne), Canada (Toronto, Vancouver), and the USA (New Jersey, Dallas).

Q: What makes TELZON different from other agencies?
A: TELZON builds AI growth infrastructure — not just campaigns. This includes automated lead generation systems, CRM workflows, SEO automation agents, and 24/7 content and analytics systems that compound results over time.

Q: How do I contact TELZON?
A: WhatsApp +91 9923022925, call +91 9307189776, or email info@telzonmarketing.in. Free strategy calls are available.

Q: What is TELZON's pricing?
A: Services start from ₹8,000/month for social media management, ₹12,000/month for SEO, ₹15,000/month for Google Ads, and custom packages for full-stack AI growth systems. International pricing in USD/AED/CAD/AUD available.
